calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
PRJ: Erwing Pfieffer, Clerks: P. Dias/M. vallejo, CSR: Susan Crozier
Appearances:
Olimpic View Realty, present with counsel, Alan Horwitz, Esq. Represented by: Florence Lopez, Property Manager.
Mary Rogus, Defendant present in pro per.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a (future) judgment against the defendant for restitution and (immediate) possession of the premises of the property located at:
100 Font Blvd. #11-B, San Francisco, CA.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Securtiy deposit is forfeited.
If the defendant vacates the premises on or before 7/20/03, plaintiff waives all back rent, damages and to dismiss the action with prejudice.
Each party waives claim against the other.
Each to bears its own costs and attorney's fees.
Any items left in the premises will be disposed of.
No one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession.
If the defendant did not comply with the agreement, plaintiff may so state by ex parte declaration, with (24) hours telephone notice to the defendant and have judgment entered.
Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
